hook.text: UNITED NEW STADIUM UNDER POLITICAL THREAT

beats.text: UNITED PLAN A NEW GROUND WITH 100,000 SEATS
THE PROJECT NEEDS MAYOR ANDY BURNHAM'S BACKING
BURNHAM COULD WIN AND QUIT AS MAYOR
A NEW MAYOR COULD BLOCK THE WHOLE PROJECT

caption: United's 100,000-seat new Old Trafford could be in danger. The Times reports a Makerfield by-election on June 18 could force Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham to quit his role — and a new mayor could withdraw funding approvals and block land deals essential to the project. 🔴 Do you trust politicians to back United's stadium dream? REPORTED — per The Times / Football Ground Guide.
